pageContext.name: Chopperemon (Warriors Alliance)
pageContext.description: Sideshow and MegaHouse are excited to present the Chopperemon (Warriors Alliance) Collectible Figure!  From the One Piece anime comes a new Portrait of Pirates One Piece collectible figure. Standing at 4.1' tall the toddler-sized human/reindeer hybrid of the Straw Hat Pirates is seen throwing ninja stars.  Don't miss your chance to add this Tony Tony Chopper figure to your One Piece collectibles display today!
